meta.note: Hand-curated shows from regional venues/promoters no scraper covers yet (China venues, Live Nation FR, …). Each entry verified against the official ticketing page on the date in _checked. Add here whenever a gap is found; build merges automatically. Images: ALWAYS the original full-size official URL — no compression, no self-hosting (user preference: quality over speed).
